action.reasoning: Observation: Val AP=0.2577 at epoch 70, eval score 0.2500 (new best). Model still slowly improving. Each epoch ~68s. With 3.64h remaining and 15 iterations left. Analysis: The model is plateauing slowly. The ReduceLROnPlateau scheduler should be reducing LR. Let me continue training for 40 more epochs (epoch 70->110, ~45 min). Also, I should try to improve the architecture - one key improvement would be to use attention pooling or set2set pooling instead of mean pooling, and also try a deeper MLP classifier. But first, let me just continue training since the model is still improving and submit eval after.
